summary: Verified and tested that transition.mjs detects a repeating pattern of length K ≥ 2 in a task's transitionHistory after the pattern repeats at least 2× and logs a warning to progress.md. The oscillation detection code was already in place; added a focused test that builds a [in-progress, failed] ×2 history and asserts the 5th transition is allowed (reps=2 warns, not halts) and that progress.md receives a timestamped warning entry.
